title: neocleome spinosa
intro: Neocleome spinosa, also known as the "snake wood," is a plant species native to tropical regions of the world. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neocleome spinosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
